SEARCH
Package io.squid.cybreathe.models

Class AbstractCell

java.lang.Object
io.squid.cybreathe.models.AbstractCell
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
AirCell, BuildingCell, FactoryCell, VegetationCell
public abstract class AbstractCell extends Object implements Serializable
Abstract base class representing a Cell on the 2D grid. Combines basic properties with polymorphic simulation execution methods.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    AbstractCell(int x, int y, double initialPollution)
    Constructs an AbstractCell at the specified coordinates with an initial pollution level.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    commitState()
    Commits the computed double-buffered state to the active state.
    void
    computeNextState(SimulationParameters params, Grid grid)
    Convenience method to compute the next state without a tick parameter, defaulting to 0.
    abstract void
    computeNextState(SimulationParameters params, Grid grid, int tick)
    Calculates the next state of the cell based on neighbors and parameters, and stores it in the double-buffered next state field.
    double
    getCustomRate()
    Gets the custom rate for this cell.
    abstract String
    getName()
    Gets the name of the cell type.
    double
    getNextPollutionLevel()
    Gets the computed next pollution level (double-buffered state).
    double
    getPollutionLevel()
    Gets the current pollution level of this cell.
    int
    getX()
    Gets the x-coordinate of this cell.
    int
    getY()
    Gets the y-coordinate of this cell.
    void
    setCustomRate(double customRate)
    Sets the custom rate for this cell, ensuring it is non-negative.
    void
    setNextPollutionLevel(double nextPollutionLevel)
    Sets the computed next pollution level, clamping it between 0.0 and 3.0.
    void
    setPollutionLevel(double pollutionLevel)
    Sets the current pollution level of this cell, clamping it between 0.0 and 3.0.

  • Constructor Details

    • AbstractCell

      public AbstractCell(int x, int y, double initialPollution)
      Constructs an AbstractCell at the specified coordinates with an initial pollution level.
      Parameters:
      x - the x-coordinate of the cell
      y - the y-coordinate of the cell
      initialPollution - the initial pollution level, clamped between 0.0 and 3.0

  • Method Details

    • getX

      public int getX()
      Gets the x-coordinate of this cell.
      Returns:
      the x-coordinate

    • getY

      public int getY()
      Gets the y-coordinate of this cell.
      Returns:
      the y-coordinate

    • getName

      public abstract String getName()
      Gets the name of the cell type.
      Returns:
      the cell type name (e.g. "AIR", "VEGETATION", "FACTORY", "BUILDING")

    • getPollutionLevel

      public double getPollutionLevel()
      Gets the current pollution level of this cell.
      Returns:
      the current pollution level

    • setPollutionLevel

      public void setPollutionLevel(double pollutionLevel)
      Sets the current pollution level of this cell, clamping it between 0.0 and 3.0. Levels below 0.01 are set to 0.0.
      Parameters:
      pollutionLevel - the new pollution level to set

    • getNextPollutionLevel

      public double getNextPollutionLevel()
      Gets the computed next pollution level (double-buffered state).
      Returns:
      the next pollution level

    • setNextPollutionLevel

      public void setNextPollutionLevel(double nextPollutionLevel)
      Sets the computed next pollution level, clamping it between 0.0 and 3.0. Levels below 0.01 are set to 0.0.
      Parameters:
      nextPollutionLevel - the next pollution level to set

    • getCustomRate

      public double getCustomRate()
      Gets the custom rate for this cell.
      Returns:
      the custom rate

    • setCustomRate

      public void setCustomRate(double customRate)
      Sets the custom rate for this cell, ensuring it is non-negative.
      Parameters:
      customRate - the new custom rate

    • computeNextState

      public void computeNextState(SimulationParameters params, Grid grid)
      Convenience method to compute the next state without a tick parameter, defaulting to 0.
      Parameters:
      params - the simulation parameters to use for calculations
      grid - the grid containing this cell and its neighbors

    • computeNextState

      public abstract void computeNextState(SimulationParameters params, Grid grid, int tick)
      Calculates the next state of the cell based on neighbors and parameters, and stores it in the double-buffered next state field.
      Parameters:
      params - the simulation parameters to use for calculations
      grid - the grid containing this cell and its neighbors
      tick - the current simulation tick count

    • commitState

      public void commitState()
      Commits the computed double-buffered state to the active state.
